task: I’m trying to reply to a seller who keeps changing the details and adding extra back-and-forth. Can you help me draft a message that handles the situation clearly so I can send it and move on?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here are a few clean options you can send, depending on how firm you want to be:

**Polite but direct:**
> Hi, I’m interested, but the details keep changing. If you can confirm the final price, pickup time, and location, I can decide from there.

**Short and firm:**
> Hey, I’m happy to move forward if the price, time, and location are set. If not, I’m going to pass.

**Very simple:**
> Please send the final details when they’re confirmed. Otherwise I’ll look elsewhere.

If you want, I can make it sound **more polite, more firm, or more casual**.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, the short firm one works. I’d send:

Hey, I’m happy to move forward if the price, time, and location are set. If not, I’m gonna pass.

Clean enough.
